hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"command\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null || echo ""); if echo "$CMD" | grep -q "git commit" && echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE "Co-Authored-By: Claude|Generated with.*Claude"; then echo "Remove Co-Authored-By and AI attribution from commit message" >&2; exit 2; fi'
